text: In the first scene, I feel slightly off-kilter and disoriented—the angle, the bright and dark contrasts, and the emptiness all evoke a distant, almost uncanny sense of isolation. In the second, surrounded by innovative displays and colorful graphics, curiosity and anticipation blossom in me. Here, I sense purpose, intellect, and creativity—my mind is alive with questions about technology, humanity, and our evolving relationship with machines.
